message:
feat(settings): Add granular visual effects controls and diff glow rendering

Introduces fine-grained control over visual effects through the Settings
overlay, along with a new glow effect for diff highlights in the sequence
grid renderer.

## Settings Overlay Enhancements

### New Scanlines Toggle
- Independent control over the CRT scanline overlay effect
- Respects user's prefers-reduced-motion setting (shows "Suppressed" hint)
- Persisted via useWebPreferences store

### New Glow Toggle
- Controls the soft glow effect applied to diff highlights
- When enabled, adds a subtle luminous halo around changed bases
- Improves visual distinction of differences in comparison mode

### UX Improvements
- Changed "Disabled by" to "Suppressed by" for reduced motion messaging
  (more accurate - effects are suppressed, not removed from settings)
- Removed disabled state from Background Effects button (user can still
  toggle preference even if reduced motion suppresses rendering)

## MatrixRain Component Refactoring

### Opacity Handling
- Add clamp01() utility function for safe opacity values
- Use clamped base alpha to prevent values >1.0 when highlighting head chars
- Fix potential rendering artifacts from invalid globalAlpha values

### CSS Architecture
- Move inline styles to .matrix-rain CSS class
- Styles now in index.css: position, inset, dimensions, pointer-events
- Cleaner separation of concerns between JS logic and presentation

## Canvas Sequence Grid Renderer

### Diff Highlight Glow Effect
New conditional glow rendering for diff cells when:
- glow preference is enabled
- reducedMotion is not active
- cell dimensions are at least 10x10 pixels (prevents blur artifacts at small sizes)

Implementation:
- Dynamic blur radius: 35% of cell height, clamped to 2-10px range
- Shadow color matches the diff highlight color for cohesive appearance
- 35% opacity for subtle, non-distracting effect
- Uses canvas save/restore to isolate shadow state

### Performance Considerations
- Glow only renders when cells are large enough to benefit
- Small cells skip the effect entirely (no wasted GPU cycles)
- Shadow state properly restored to prevent affecting subsequent draws

## CSS Additions
- .matrix-rain: Full-coverage positioning for background effect
- .command-palette-category-icon: Flexbox centering for SVG category icons

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
